event: Contemporary Performance Art with Soviet Imagery
description: A color photograph showing a staged group scene with people gathered around red Soviet-era flags and banners. Several figures are in various states of dress, some partially unclothed, arranged in a tableau-like composition amid the red flags. A round emblem with Cyrillic letters is visible in the lower left. The setting appears to be outdoors with trees in the background. The scene has the quality of a deliberate artistic performance or provocation.
